rationale: The two papers are in different primary domains (VFR/BMI self-image threat vs. charitable giving and moral identity discrepancy), so a direct substantive link is not evident from topics alone. However, the citing paper explicitly tests a prosocial engagement intervention, and the cited paper provides theory/evidence on prosocial behavior reducing identity discrepancy, which could be a mechanism source; with only a single DOI match and no in-text citation context, it is not safe to drop.
